name: agentic-kanban
description: A profile-driven Kanban board for AI-assisted software development with persistent markdown task conversations.

commands.title: Agentic Kanban: Apply Settings to Board Config

agentKanban.enableLogging.description: Enable diagnostic logging to .agentkanban/logs/. Rolling 10 MB files, max 5. Requires reload after changing.

agentKanban.customInstructionFile.description: Path to a custom instruction file injected into the /task workflow. Standard agent files (AGENTS.md, copilot-instructions.md, etc.) are unaffected and continue to work as normal. Relative paths resolve from the workspace root.

agentKanban.defaultProfile.description: Workflow profile used when initialising a new board. Existing board.yaml files stay authoritative until you apply settings explicitly.

agentKanban.worktreeRequiredForImplement.description: Seed the board worktree requirement when initialising or applying settings. Profile default keeps the built-in Lite or Standard behavior.

agentKanban.enforcementMode.description: Seed or apply the board enforcement mode. Profile default keeps Lite in warn mode and Standard in strict mode.

agentKanban.worktreeRoot.description: Root directory for task worktrees. Use {repo} as a placeholder for the repository name. Relative paths resolve from the workspace root.

agentKanban.worktreeOpenBehavior.description: Whether to open worktrees in the current window or a new window.

agentKanban.enforceWorktrees.description: Require a git worktree before using /refresh. When enabled, the command prompts to create a worktree if one doesn't exist.

agentKanban.skillsDirs.description: Additional directories to scan for agent skills. Supports ~/ for home directory and workspace-relative paths.

commands.name: refresh
commands.description: Re-inject agent context for the selected task

commands.name: spec
commands.description: [capability] - scaffold spec-driven change artifacts for the selected task

commands.name: worktree
commands.description: Create, open, or remove a git worktree for the selected task

commands.name: archive
commands.description: [slug] - move a completed change folder to changes/archive/

commands.name: prompts
commands.description: write/refresh the bundled stage-driver prompts in .agentkanban/prompts/

commands.name: loop
commands.description: [lane] - loop-until-dry over ready tasks with profile-aware advance target (default lane: planning/in-progress)

commands.name: goal
commands.description: new <objective> | show <slug> - define a goal, decompose into tasks, track progress

commands.name: doctor
commands.description: run workflow diagnostics for lane drift, blockers, dependencies, and worktrees

commands.name: work
commands.description: [task name] - pick a not-done task and copy a work prompt to clipboard
